notes: Just played the tutorial and started the first mission. Everything worked fine, same as my last experience on Windows.
title: QuiVr

notes: Requires `protontricks 489380 vcrun2015` and manual creation of `C:\ProgramData\FOVE` directory in prefix. Seems to work fine afterwards, but at nontrivial performance penalty over Windows.
title: QuiVr

notes: Crashes on start almost always. I got it running once but never again since. The workarounds that are suggested in another review (created FOVE folder and install vcrun2015) do not help. This seems to be a Unity VR issue that hits other games too.
title: QuiVr
